OCR benchmark fixtures

Add image + text pairs here to enable the OCR benchmark test.

Naming rules:
1. Each image must have a matching .txt file with the same base name.
2. Images can be .png, .jpg, or .jpeg.
3. Ground-truth text files must be UTF-8.

Suggested categories to cover:
1. printed_english
2. printed_hindi
3. printed_marathi
4. mixed_en_hi
5. mixed_hi_mr
6. mixed_en_mr
7. handwriting_neat
8. handwriting_messy
9. classroom_board
10. low_light_skew

Example pair:
printed_english_001.jpg
printed_english_001.txt
